Home / Video Conferencing / Jitsi Meet

Jitsi Meet — open source alternative

Open source video meetings you can self-host or use free.

Strengths

  • Free public instance (meet.jit.si) with no sign-up.
  • Self-hostable for privacy.
  • Webhook and SDK integrations available.

Weaknesses

  • Tuning a self-hosted instance for scale takes ops work.
  • Advanced features (e2ee, breakouts) evolving.
  • No native desktop app.
License: Apache-2.0 Self-host difficulty: 3/5 Hosted cloud optionMobile: iOS, Android

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

Jitsi Meet is used as an alternative to

Zoom

Video meetings, webinars and events.

See all alternatives →

Google Meet

Meetings embedded in Google Workspace.

See all alternatives →

Cisco Webex

Enterprise video meetings and webinars from Cisco.

See all alternatives →
